name: development-workflow
description: Create approved product requirements, technical specifications, and reviewed plans, then generate executable Codex handoff prompts.

interface.shortDescription: Create PRDs, plans, and handoff prompts.
interface.longDescription: Create approved product requirements and technical specifications, produce independently reviewed plans, then generate self-contained development handoff prompts.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create an approved PRD, turn it into an approved technical spec and reviewed plan, then generate a Codex handoff prompt.
